title: Ollama service not running on Raspberry Pi
symptom: The Ollama service is not active, which prevents n8n from accessing the models. Users may see errors related to model loading.
applies_when: Running n8n and Ollama on Raspberry Pi
root_cause: The Ollama service may not be started or may have crashed, leading to n8n being unable to connect and load models. This can happen due to various reasons, including misconfiguration or resource limitations.
fix_steps: Check the status of the Ollama service with 'sudo systemctl status ollama'
If it is not active, start it with 'sudo systemctl start ollama'
agent_instruction: Ensure the Ollama service is running on your Raspberry Pi.
